source_pr.title: vendor: update etcd and kvproto
source_pr.body: update etcd to v3.2.6 to fix a etcd client bug

symptoms: update goleveldb to fix DATA RACE in test
failure_signature: update goleveldb to fix DATA RACE in test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: vendor: update etcd and kvproto.

evidence: evidence: update goleveldb to fix DATA RACE in test
